---
title: "parse_eslint.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\parse_eslint.js"
loc: 16
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.00
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.81
---

## Intent
The `parse_eslint.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on data, totalErrors, totalWarnings. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via data, totalErrors, totalWarnings. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `data`
- `totalErrors`
- `totalWarnings`
